Trigger.name: DB and PB
Trigger.script:
equip_db:reset_eq_info()
equip_db.eq_info.name = multimatches[1][2] equip_db.eq_info.weight = tonumber(multimatches[3][2]) equip_db.eq_info.db = tonumber(multimatches[5][2]) equip_db.eq_info.pb = tonumber(multimatches[5][3])
equip_db:update_item("trinkets", equip_db.eq_info, true)
equip_db:reset_eq_info()

Trigger.name: DB, PB, and Moves
Trigger.script:
equip_db:reset_eq_info()
equip_db.eq_info.name = multimatches[1][2] equip_db.eq_info.weight = tonumber(multimatches[3][2]) equip_db.eq_info.db = tonumber(multimatches[5][2]) equip_db.eq_info.pb = tonumber(multimatches[5][3]) equip_db.eq_info.mvs = tonumber(multimatches[5][4])
equip_db:update_item("trinkets", equip_db.eq_info, true)
equip_db:reset_eq_info()

Trigger.name: DB, PB, Moves, and Abs
Trigger.script:
equip_db:reset_eq_info()
equip_db.eq_info.name = multimatches[1][2] equip_db.eq_info.weight = tonumber(multimatches[3][2]) equip_db.eq_info.db = tonumber(multimatches[5][2]) equip_db.eq_info.pb = tonumber(multimatches[5][3]) equip_db.eq_info.mvs = tonumber(multimatches[5][4]) equip_db.eq_info.abs = tonumber(multimatches[5][5])
equip_db:update_item("armor", equip_db.eq_info, true)
equip_db:reset_eq_info()

regexCodeList.string: ^Dodging bonus: (-?\d+), Parrying bonus: (-?\d+), Moves: (-?\d+), Armor absorb: (-?\d+\.\d*)%\.$

Trigger.name: Weapon - not honed
Trigger.script:
equip_db:reset_eq_info()
equip_db.eq_info.name = multimatches[1][2] equip_db.eq_info.weight = tonumber(multimatches[3][2]) equip_db.eq_info.hands = (multimatches[5][2] == "" and 1 or 0) --set 2h weapon to 0, as unclear if actually 2h or 1.5h equip_db.eq_info.weapon_type = multimatches[5][3] equip_db.eq_info.ob = tonumber(multimatches[7][2]) equip_db.eq_info.pb = tonumber(multimatches[7][3]) equip_db.eq_info.dmg = multimatches[7][4]
equip_db:update_item("weapons", equip_db.eq_info, true)
equip_db:reset_eq_info()

Trigger.name: Weapon - not hardened
Trigger.script:
equip_db:reset_eq_info()
equip_db.eq_info.name = multimatches[1][2] equip_db.eq_info.weight = tonumber(multimatches[3][2]) equip_db.eq_info.hands = (multimatches[5][2] == "" and 1 or 0) --set 2h weapon to 0, as unclear if actually 2h or 1.5h equip_db.eq_info.weapon_type = multimatches[5][3] equip_db.eq_info.ob = tonumber(multimatches[7][2]) equip_db.eq_info.pb = tonumber(multimatches[7][3]) equip_db.eq_info.dmg = multimatches[7][4]
equip_db:update_item("weapons", equip_db.eq_info, true)
equip_db:reset_eq_info()

Trigger.name: Weapon - hardened
Trigger.script:
equip_db:reset_eq_info()
equip_db.eq_info.name = multimatches[1][2] equip_db.eq_info.weight = tonumber(multimatches[3][2]) equip_db.eq_info.hands = (multimatches[5][2] == "" and 1 or 0) --set 2h weapon to 0, as unclear if actually 2h or 1.5h equip_db.eq_info.weapon_type = multimatches[5][3] equip_db.eq_info.ob = tonumber(multimatches[7][2]) - 5 equip_db.eq_info.pb = tonumber(multimatches[7][3]) equip_db.eq_info.dmg = multimatches[7][4]
equip_db:update_item("weapons", equip_db.eq_info, true)
equip_db:reset_eq_info()

regexCodeList.string: It has been honed and hardened by

Trigger.name: Two handed weapon
Trigger.script:
equip_db:reset_eq_info()
equip_db.eq_info.name = matches[2] equip_db.eq_info.hands = 2
equip_db:update_item("weapons", equip_db.eq_info, true)
equip_db:reset_eq_info()

regexCodeList.string: ^You need two hands free to wield (.+)\.$

Trigger.name: 1.5 handed weapon
Trigger.script:
equip_db:reset_eq_info()
equip_db.eq_info.name = matches[2] equip_db.eq_info.hands = 1.5
equip_db:update_item("weapons", equip_db.eq_info, true)
equip_db:reset_eq_info()

Alias.name: Show help
Alias.script: equip_db:show_help()

Alias.name: Update equipment database
Alias.script:
--syntax: edb update
db:close("equipment")
equip_db:echo("Downloading updated database...\n") local url = "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/weisluke/WoTMUD/master/Database_equipment.db" local saveto = f"{getMudletHomeDir()}/Database_equipment.db" downloadFile(saveto, url)

Alias.name: Reset database
Alias.script: equip_db:create_db()

Alias.name: Enable/disable triggers
Alias.script: if isActive("Equipment Database", "trigger") > 0 then disableTrigger("Equipment Database") equip_db:echo("Triggers deactivated.\n") else enableTrigger("Equipment Database") equip_db:echo("Triggers activated.\n") end

Alias.name: Show all items
Alias.script: equip_db:show_weapons() equip_db:show_armor() equip_db:show_trinkets()

Alias.name: Show weapons
Alias.script: equip_db:show_weapons()

Alias.name: Show weapons name
Alias.script: equip_db:show_weapons(matches[2])

Alias.name: Show weapons type
Alias.script: equip_db:show_weapons(nil, nil, matches[2])

Alias.name: Show armor
Alias.script: equip_db:show_armor()

Alias.name: Show armor name
Alias.script: equip_db:show_armor(matches[2])

Alias.name: Show armor slot
Alias.script: equip_db:show_armor(nil, nil, matches[2])

Alias.name: Show trinkets
Alias.script: equip_db:show_trinkets()

Alias.name: Show trinkets name
Alias.script: equip_db:show_trinkets(matches[2])

Alias.name: Show trinkets slot
Alias.script: equip_db:show_trinkets(nil, nil, matches[2])

Alias.name: Update hands
Alias.script:
local eq_type = matches[2] local name = matches[3] local hands = tonumber(matches[4])
equip_db:update_item(eq_type, {name=name, hands=hands})

Alias.name: Update weapon_type
Alias.script:
local eq_type = matches[2] local name = matches[3] local weapon_type = matches[4]
equip_db:update_item(eq_type, {name=name, weapon_type=weapon_type})

Alias.name: Update dmg_type
Alias.script:
local eq_type = matches[2] local name = matches[3] local dmg_type = matches[4]
equip_db:update_item(eq_type, {name=name, dmg_type=dmg_type})

Alias.name: Update armor eq_slot
Alias.script:
local eq_type = matches[2] local name = matches[3] local eq_slot = matches[4]
equip_db:update_item(eq_type, {name=name, eq_slot=eq_slot})

Alias.name: Update trinkets eq_slot
Alias.script:
local eq_type = matches[2] local name = matches[3] local eq_slot = matches[4]
equip_db:update_item(eq_type, {name=name, eq_slot=eq_slot})

Alias.name: Force update trinkets eq_slot
Alias.script:
local eq_type = matches[2] local name = matches[3] local eq_slot = matches[4]
equip_db:update_item(eq_type, {name=name, eq_slot=eq_slot}, true)

Alias.name: Update armor/trinkets setup
Alias.script:
local eq_type = matches[2] local name = matches[3] local setup = matches[4]
equip_db:update_item(eq_type, {name=name, setup=setup})

Alias.name: Force update armor/trinkets setup
Alias.script:
local eq_type = matches[2] local name = matches[3] local setup = matches[4]
equip_db:update_item(eq_type, {name=name, setup=setup}, true)

Alias.name: edb delete
Alias.script:
--deletes the ENTIRE equipment database
local equipment = db:get_database("equipment") for _, field in pairs(table.keys(equip_db.eq_fields)) do db:delete(equipment[field], true) end equip_db:echo("The entire equipment database has been deleted.\n") equip_db:create_db()

Alias.name: edb delete weapons/armor/trinkets
Alias.script:
--deletes the ENTIRE weapons or armor or trinkets database
local field = matches[2]
local equipment = db:get_database("equipment") db:delete(equipment[field], true) equip_db:echo(f"The equipment database for ({field}) has been deleted.\n") equip_db:create_db()

Alias.name: edb delete weapons/armor/trinkets name
Alias.script:
--deletes the item with the given name from the given database sheet
local field = matches[2] local name = matches[3]
local equipment = db:get_database("equipment") db:delete(equipment[field], db:like(equipment[field].name, f"%{name}%")) equip_db:echo(f"The equipment database ({field}) entry for ({name}) has been deleted.\n") equip_db:create_db()

Alias.name: Move item from sheet
Alias.script:
local sheet1 = matches[2] local name = matches[3] local sheet2 = matches[4]
local equipment = db:get_database("equipment")
local items = db:fetch(equipment[sheet1], db:like(equipment[sheet1].name, f"%{name}%"))
if table.is_empty(items) then equip_db:echo(f"
Item ({name}) not found in the equipment database.
", false, true) elseif table.size(items) > 1 then equip_db:echo(f"
Item ({name}) is not unique. Found the following items:
", false, true) for _, item in pairs(items) do cecho(f"{item.name}
") end else item = items[1] db:delete(equipment[sheet1], item) if sheet1 == "armor" and sheet2 == "trinkets" then item.abs = nil end db:add(equipment[sheet2], item) equip_db:echo(f"Item ({item.name}) moved from ({sheet1}) to ({sheet2}).
") end

Script.name: equip_db:echo
Script.script:
function equip_db:echo(what, debug, err) --colored tags for message echo local main_tag = "<gray>(<white>equip_db<gray>): <white>" local debug_tag = "<deep_sky_blue>(<royal_blue>debug<deep_sky_blue>): <white>" local err_tag = "<coral>(<red>error<coral>): <white>"
--if debug message and config debug is false, return without echoing if debug and not self.configs.dbug then return end
--if start of message is new line, print that before colored tags of message echo if what:sub(0,1)=="\n" then cecho("\n") what = what:sub(2) end cecho(main_tag) if debug then cecho(debug_tag) end if err then cecho(err_tag) end cecho(what) end

Script.name: equip_db:create_db
Script.script:
equip_db.eq_fields = { weapons = {"name", "hands", "weapon_type", "ob", "pb", "dmg", "weight", "dmg_type"}, armor = {"name", "eq_slot", "db", "pb", "mvs", "abs", "weight", "setup"}, trinkets = {"name", "eq_slot", "db", "pb", "mvs", "weight", "setup"} }
function equip_db:create_db() db:create( "equipment", { weapons = { name = "", hands = 0, weapon_type = "", ob = 0, pb = 0, dmg = "", weight = 0, dmg_type = "", }, armor = { name = "", eq_slot = "", db = 0, pb = 0, mvs = 0, abs = 0, weight = 0, setup = "" }, trinkets = { name = "", eq_slot = "", db = 0, pb = 0, mvs = 0, weight = 0, setup = "" }, } )
end
equip_db:create_db()

Script.name: equip_db:show_help
Script.script:
function equip_db:show_help() local help = [[ <cyan>Equipment Database Script<reset>
This script will capture and store equipment stats in a database located at at ]] .. getMudletHomeDir() .. [[/Database_equipment.db
Below is a brief overview of some commands that this script includes. All commands can be found in the appropriate equipment database folder under mudlet aliases.
<cyan>Commands:<reset> <yellow>edb help<reset> - Show this help message. <yellow>edb update<reset> - Downloads, saves, and loads the latest version of the equipment database from https://github.com/weisluke/WoTMUD <yellow>edb triggers<reset> - Enable/disable the equipment stat capture triggers <yellow>edb show<reset> - Show all items in the database. <yellow>edb show weapons/armor/trinkets<reset> - Show all weapons, armor, or trinkets. <yellow>edb show weapons/armor/trinkets name xxx<reset> - Show all weapons, armor or trinkets with the given name. Ex: edb show weapons name heron, edb show armor name gold, edb show trinkets name jeweled <yellow>edb show weapons type xxx<reset> - Show all weapons of the given type. Ex: edb show weapons type blade, edb show weapons type staff <yellow>edb show armor/trinkets slot xxx<reset> - Show all armor or trinkets of the given slot. Ex: edb show armor slot head, edb show trinkets slot wrist
Commands for editing items in the database (not typically needed):
<yellow>edb (weapons|armor|trinkets) weight xxx yyy<reset> - Set the weight of an item <yellow>edb force (weapons|armor|trinkets) weight xxx yyy<reset> - Force the weight <yellow>edb weapons dmg_type xxx yyy<reset> - Set the dmg type for a weapon <yellow>edb (armor|trinkets) eq_slot xxx yyy<reset> - Set the eq slot for an item Valid armor slots: head, body, arms, hands, legs, feet, shield Valid trinket slots: finger, neck, wrist, cloak, belt, sheath <yellow>edb (armor|trinkets) setup xxx yyy<reset> - Set the setup for an item <yellow>edb force (armor|trinkets) setup xxx yyy<reset> - Force the setup <yellow>edb move (armor|trinkets) name xxx (armor|trinkets)<reset> - Move an item from one sheet to another
<yellow>edb delete<reset> - Delete the entire database. <red>USE WITH CAUTION!<reset> <yellow>edb delete (weapons|armor|trinkets)<reset> - Delete the entire given sheet <yellow>edb delete (weapons|armor|trinkets) name xxx<reset> - Delete the item with the given name from the given sheet
]] cecho(help) end

Script.name: equip_db:update_item
Script.script:
function equip_db:update_item(eq_type, info, exact_name)
if not info.name then self:echo("
Attempt to add item with no name.
", false, true) return end
if not table.index_of(table.keys(self.eq_fields), eq_type) then self:echo(f"
Equipment type ({eq_type}) not known.
", false, true) return end
local equipment = db:get_database("equipment")
local items = {}
--need to loop over all sheets, as some items don't display stats --present in their sheet --e.g., a camouflaged hood doesn't have any abs, so it would register --as a trinket. we don't want to create a new trinket item every time --we examine the hood, we want to update the one that already exists for _, sheet in pairs(table.keys(self.eq_fields)) do local tab if exact_name then tab = db:fetch(equipment[sheet], db:eq(equipment[sheet].name, info.name)) else tab = db:fetch(equipment[sheet], db:like(equipment[sheet].name, "%"..info.name.."%")) end
for _, item in pairs(tab) do if not table.contains(items, item) then table.insert(items, item) end end end
if table.is_empty(items) then db:add(equipment[eq_type], info) self:echo(f"
Item ({info.name}) added to the equipment database.
") elseif table.size(items) > 1 then self:echo(f"
Item ({info.name}) is not unique. Found the following items:
", false, true) for _, item in pairs(items) do cecho(item.name.."
") end else item = items[1] --ensure that if we gave a shortcut to the name, we use the proper full name already in the database info.name = item.name for _, field in pairs(self.eq_fields[eq_type]) do if info[field] and item[field] ~= info[field] then self:echo(f"
({field}) for ({item.name}) updated from ({item[field]}) to ({info[field]})
") item[field] = info[field] end end db:update(equipment[eq_type], item) end
end

Script.name: equip_db:db_update
Script.script:
function equip_db:db_update(event, filename) --if the file that downloaded is not the database, return if not filename:find("Database_equipment.db", 1, true) then return end self:echo("Download complete.\n") self:create_db() end
registerAnonymousEventHandler("sysDownloadDone", "equip_db:db_update")

Script.name: equip_db:get_weapons
Script.script:
local function sort_weapons(e1, e2) --sort first by weapon type, then hands, then ob, then pb, then dmg
if e1.weapon_type < e2.weapon_type then return true elseif e1.weapon_type > e2.weapon_type then return false else if e1.hands > e2.hands then return true elseif e1.hands < e2.hands then return false else if e1.ob > e2.ob then return true elseif e1.ob < e2.ob then return false else if e1.pb > e2.pb then return true elseif e1.pb < e2.pb then return false else local dmg1 = e1.dmg local dmg2 = e2.dmg
local x1 = dmg1:match("(%d+)d%d+") local y1 = dmg1:match("%d+d(%d+)")
local x2 = dmg2:match("(%d+)d%d+") local y2 = dmg2:match("%d+d(%d+)")
if x1*(y1 + 1)/2 > x2*(y2 + 1)/2 then return true elseif x1*(y1 + 1)/2 < x2*(y2 + 1)/2 then return false else return true end end end end end end
function equip_db:get_weapons(name, name_exact, weapon_type, weapon_type_exact) local equipment = db:get_database("equipment")
name = name or "" weapon_type = weapon_type or ""
local weapons
if name_exact then if weapon_type_exact then weapons = db:fetch(equipment.weapons, db:AND( db:eq(equipment.weapons.name, name), db:eq(equipment.weapons.weapon_type, weapon_type) ) ) else weapons = db:fetch(equipment.weapons, db:AND( db:eq(equipment.weapons.name, name), db:like(equipment.weapons.weapon_type, f"%{weapon_type}%") ) ) end else if weapon_type_exact then weapons = db:fetch(equipment.weapons, db:AND( db:like(equipment.weapons.name, f"%{name}%"), db:eq(equipment.weapons.weapon_type, weapon_type) ) ) else weapons = db:fetch(equipment.weapons, db:AND( db:like(equipment.weapons.name, f"%{name}%"), db:like(equipment.weapons.weapon_type, f"%{weapon_type}%") ) ) end end
local sorted = false
--sometimes sorting once doesn't do the trick, for some odd reason repeat table.sort(weapons, sort_weapons) sorted = true
for i=1, table.size(weapons)-1, 1 do if not sort_weapons(weapons[i], weapons[i+1]) then sorted = false end end until(sorted)
return weapons end

Script.name: equip_db:get_armor
Script.script:
local function sort_armor(e1, e2) --sort first by setup, then eq slot, then abs, then db, then pb, then mvs
local order = {"", "head", "body", "arms", "hands", "legs", "feet", "shield"}
if e1.setup < e2.setup then return true elseif e1.setup > e2.setup then return false else if table.index_of(order, e1.eq_slot) < table.index_of(order, e2.eq_slot) then return true elseif table.index_of(order, e1.eq_slot) > table.index_of(order, e2.eq_slot) then return false else if e1.abs > e2.abs then return true elseif e1.abs < e2.abs then return false else if e1.db > e2.db then return true elseif e1.db < e2.db then return false else if e1.pb > e2.pb then return true elseif e1.pb < e2.pb then return false else if e1.mvs > e2.mvs then return true elseif e1.mvs < e2.mvs then return false else return true end end end end end end end
function equip_db:get_armor(name, name_exact, eq_slot, eq_slot_exact) local equipment = db:get_database("equipment")
name = name or "" eq_slot = eq_slot or ""
local armor
if name_exact then if eq_slot_exact then armor = db:fetch(equipment.armor, db:AND( db:eq(equipment.armor.name, name), db:eq(equipment.armor.eq_slot, eq_slot) ) ) else armor = db:fetch(equipment.armor, db:AND( db:eq(equipment.armor.name, name), db:like(equipment.armor.eq_slot, f"%{eq_slot}%") ) ) end else if eq_slot_exact then armor = db:fetch(equipment.armor, db:AND( db:like(equipment.armor.name, f"%{name}%"), db:eq(equipment.armor.eq_slot, eq_slot) ) ) else armor = db:fetch(equipment.armor, db:AND( db:like(equipment.armor.name, f"%{name}%"), db:like(equipment.armor.eq_slot, f"%{eq_slot}%") ) ) end end
local sorted = false
--sometimes sorting once doesn't do the trick, for some odd reason repeat table.sort(armor, sort_armor) sorted = true
for i=1, table.size(armor)-1, 1 do if not sort_armor(armor[i], armor[i+1]) then sorted = false end end until(sorted)
return armor end

Script.name: equip_db:get_trinkets
Script.script:
local function sort_trinkets(e1, e2) --sort first by setup, then eq slot, then db, then pb, then mvs
local order = {"", "finger", "neck", "wrist", "cloak", "belt", "sheath"}
if e1.setup < e2.setup then return true elseif e1.setup > e2.setup then return false else if table.index_of(order, e1.eq_slot) < table.index_of(order, e2.eq_slot) then return true elseif table.index_of(order, e1.eq_slot) > table.index_of(order, e2.eq_slot) then return false else if e1.db > e2.db then return true elseif e1.db < e2.db then return false else if e1.pb > e2.pb then return true elseif e1.pb < e2.pb then return false else if e1.mvs > e2.mvs then return true elseif e1.mvs < e2.mvs then return false else return true end end end end end end
function equip_db:get_trinkets(name, name_exact, eq_slot, eq_slot_exact) local equipment = db:get_database("equipment")
name = name or "" eq_slot = eq_slot or ""
local trinkets
if name_exact then if eq_slot_exact then trinkets = db:fetch(equipment.trinkets, db:AND( db:eq(equipment.trinkets.name, name), db:eq(equipment.trinkets.eq_slot, eq_slot) ) ) else trinkets = db:fetch(equipment.trinkets, db:AND( db:eq(equipment.trinkets.name, name), db:like(equipment.trinkets.eq_slot, f"%{eq_slot}%") ) ) end else if eq_slot_exact then trinkets = db:fetch(equipment.trinkets, db:AND( db:like(equipment.trinkets.name, f"%{name}%"), db:eq(equipment.trinkets.eq_slot, eq_slot) ) ) else trinkets = db:fetch(equipment.trinkets, db:AND( db:like(equipment.trinkets.name, f"%{name}%"), db:like(equipment.trinkets.eq_slot, f"%{eq_slot}%") ) ) end end
local sorted = false
--sometimes sorting once doesn't do the trick, for some odd reason repeat table.sort(trinkets, sort_trinkets) sorted = true
for i=1, table.size(trinkets)-1, 1 do if not sort_trinkets(trinkets[i], trinkets[i+1]) then sorted = false end end until(sorted)
return trinkets end

Script.name: equip_db:show_weapons
Script.script:
function equip_db:show_weapons(name, name_exact, weapon_type, weapon_type_exact)
local weapons = self:get_weapons(name, name_exact, weapon_type, weapon_type_exact)
if table.is_empty(weapons) then self:echo("No weapons found in the equipment database.
", false, true) else cecho("WEAPONS

") local msg_format = "%-45s%s%-7s%-15s%-5s%-5s%-7s%-6s%-9s
" cecho(string.format(msg_format, "Name", "", "Hands", "Weapon Type", "OB", "PB", "Dmg", "Wt", "Dmg Type"))
for _, item in pairs(weapons) do
if item.name:len() < 45 then msg_format = "%-45s%s%-7s%-15s%-5s%-5s%-7s%-6s%-9s
" else msg_format = "%-45s
%-45s%-7s%-15s%-5s%-5s%-7s%-6s%-9s
" end
local msg = string.format(msg_format, item.name, "", item.hands, item.weapon_type, item.ob, item.pb, item.dmg, item.weight, item.dmg_type ) cecho(msg) end cecho("
") end end

Script.name: equip_db:show_armor
Script.script:
function equip_db:show_armor(name, name_exact, eq_slot, eq_slot_exact) local armor = self:get_armor(name, name_exact, eq_slot, eq_slot_exact)
if table.is_empty(armor) then self:echo("No armor found in the equipment database.
", false, true) else cecho("ARMOR

") local msg_format = "%-40s%s%-8s%-6s%-6s%-6s%-5s%-6s%-7s
" cecho(string.format(msg_format, "Name", "", "Slot", "DB", "PB", "Abs", "Mvs", "Wt", "Setup"))
for _, item in pairs(armor) do
if item.name:len() < 40 then msg_format = "%-40s%s%-8s%-6s%-6s%-6s%-5s%-6s%-7s
" else msg_format = "%-40s
%-40s%-8s%-6s%-6s%-6s%-5s%-6s%-7s
" end
local msg = string.format(msg_format, item.name, "", item.eq_slot, item.db, item.pb, item.abs, item.mvs, item.weight, item.setup ) cecho(msg) end cecho("
") end end

Script.name: equip_db:show_trinkets
Script.script:
function equip_db:show_trinkets(name, name_exact, eq_slot, eq_slot_exact) local trinkets = self:get_trinkets(name, name_exact, eq_slot, eq_slot_exact)
if table.is_empty(trinkets) then self:echo("No trinkets found in the equipment database.
", false, true) else cecho("TRINKETS

") local msg_format = "%-40s%s%-8s%-6s%-6s%-5s%-6s%-7s
" cecho(string.format(msg_format, "Name", "", "Slot", "DB", "PB", "Mvs", "Wt", "Setup"))
for _, item in pairs(trinkets) do
if item.name:len() < 40 then msg_format = "%-40s%s%-8s%-6s%-6s%-5s%-6s%-7s
" else msg_format = "%-40s
%-40s%-8s%-6s%-6s%-5s%-6s%-7s
" end
local msg = string.format(msg_format, item.name, "", item.eq_slot, item.db, item.pb, item.mvs, item.weight, item.setup ) cecho(msg) end cecho("
") end end
